audience: A verified website owner reading a private analysis result
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Een persoonlijk websiteanalyserapport begrijpen en de belangrijkste verbeterpunten kunnen bespreken.

searchIntent.question: What does my website analysis score mean and what should I improve first?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Private English-language report, not intended for search indexing

directAnswer: The private report combines an overall score with passed checks, warnings, issues, strengths and practical priorities, using partner findings only when their recorded output language matches the route.
title: Website analysis report | VisualVibe
metaDescription: Your private website analysis report with a score, checks and clear priorities for improvement.
factsToPreserve: The route is private and always noindex
The unpredictable report token remains unchanged
Dynamic partner findings are shown only when outputLanguage matches the route locale
Legacy reports without outputLanguage are not assumed to be English
A perfect 100/100 score must retain all report sections
Missing keyword density uses an explicit empty state
